faqs.question: How is life at NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi?
faqs.answer: Life at NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi is quite good. Practical teaching methods are followed, in which on-the-job training is given to students. NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with various facilities such as a library, conference room, and others. The classrooms are equipped with all the needed facilities. Hence, the college tries to make student learning environment quite easy.

faqs.question: Is NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi a known college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Yes, NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi is a known college/institute. NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi offers placement assistance to students and is visited by top companies for placements such as JW Marriott, TAJ Group, Accor,  and many others. NIPS Ranchi students are either permanently settled overseas or are employed there in nations such as Thailand, Singapore, the US, England, France, Canada, Germany, New Zealand, Australia,  and others.

faqs.question: Is NIPS Hotel Management, Ranchi a good college?
faqs.answer: Established in 1993, the NIPS Hotel Management Institute offers undergraduate and Diploma courses to students. These courses are provided across the Management and various other streams. There are five short-term programmes available at the college. The college is ranked among the Top 90 Hotel Management institutions in the World. The college has an approved training partner, which is NSDC. The college placements are also good. Hence, NIPS Hotel Management, Ranchi, is a good college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Hotel Management - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides very good infrastructure, facilities, and the environment.

review_content.Placements: Our college provided very good placements for students in good companies like Accord, Hyatt, Marriott, Carlson, Taj, Oberoi, etc. They got placed in Cruise liners and other corporate companies. Around 100% of placements were provided to all students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had a good infrastructure and facilities. There were proper labs and classrooms for pursuing the course. Hostel facility was good and it served good and hygienic food items for students. Hostels were safe for students to stay in.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Hotel Management and Catering Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: If you desire for hotel management. Overall I would suggest you to go for better institute.

review_content.Placements: Front office training is extraordinary and almost every student gets placement after industrial training as it take limited number of students which is 30. So providing good placement to counted students isn't a big issue for them because they are in touch with various good hospitality industry leaders.
review_content.Infrastructure: Almost every facilities are available and especially the library and the practical arrangements for actual training gives a good vibe to course. The bar and sitting section gives you real picture of food and beverage industry. The classroom are of top class.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Hotel Management, Catering Technology and Tourism - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It's an amazing campus, and the facilities are much better compared to other institutions.

review_content.Placements: I studied regularly for 2 years and know all their advantages. This college's placement rate was very good, approximately 99 to 100%. The college has top companies in aviation, such as Indigo, and in hotels like Oberoi, Taj Hotel, and all major hotels in India.
review_content.Infrastructure: NIPS has four campuses, located in Ranchi, Bhubaneswar, Kolkata, and Shillong. All campuses are truly very good, in my opinion, because I studied there regularly for 2 years, and the infrastructure is amazing in India. They have many departments on campus, like catering and others.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Hotel Management - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best hotel management college in India.

review_content.Placements: All students in our batch got placements in India as well as outside of India. The highest salary package was 10 LPA, and the lowest was 5 LPA. All placements were provided by Taj, Oberoi, JW Marriott, Accor, Leela Kempinski, and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was excellent. The campus provided Wi-Fi for students. Classrooms were spacious so that students could learn easily. There was a library where we could find all the books related to the courses. It had enough seating arrangements for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Hotel Management (with International Certification) - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Review of NIPS Hotel Management, Ranchi.

review_content.Placements: Placements of students vary from course to course. Our college provides 100% placements. The salary packages depend on students. I got placed with a salary package of 10 LPA. A student got placed in Taj Hotels with a salary of Rs. 25,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Taj, ITDC, Radisson, Hyatt, JW Marriot, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus facilities are adequate for students. Our college provides many facilities to support the learning and development of students. Some common facilities are free Wi-Fi, a lab, a library, food, etc. The Wi-Fi speed is 140 Mbps. The computer lab is available for practice purposes as well as projects. The library has many subject books, journals, and other resources. The quality of the food in the mess and canteen is good. They provide a variety of food items. The hostel has a doctor.

admission_process.title: NIPS Hotel Management, Ranchi Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: NIPS Hotel Management, Ranchi admission is merit based for programmes offered at UG, PG, and Certificate levels. In total, the institution offers 12 courses to the students across various streams, such as Hospitality & Travel and Business & Management Studies, among others. Candidates are required to follow the merit-based admission process to secure their seat in their desired course. Candidates can visit the official website ofNIPS Ranchito learn more about admissions, eligibility, and fees for the courses.

NIPS Ranchi offers a variety of courses at the UG and postgraduate levels. The courses are offered in a full-time/ offline mode for interested candidates. The courses are designed to help candidates inculcate real-life and theoretical knowledge regarding Hotel Management. Learn more about NIPS Ranchi through the highlights table given below:
Particulars
NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Admission to the UG and PG programs at NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi in 2025 is determined by merit of the. For admission to MBA, MSc, and other programs, NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi also administers entrance exams. Additionally, the eligibility requirements change depending on the course level. To find out more about theNIPS Hotel Management Ranchi courseeligibility requirements, and selection criteria, see the table below:
Note:Generic information has been added due to a lack of information on the official website.

The courses at NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi are offered for varying fees, and the fee structure is a component of various refundable and non-refundable components. Based on the admission process, candidates are shortlisted, and the candidates who receive the final admission offer are eligible to pay theNIPS Hotel Management Ranchi fee. Candidates are required to visit the official website of the institute to learn more about the course fee.

NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi admissions process is merit-based, candidates are required participate in the same by creating a login ID on the official website and then filling out the application form. First, candidates must fill out the registration form and apply for the course they want to take. The institute's main website offers the registration form online.The detailed admissions procedure for NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi is shown below in a step-wise manner:
Step 1: NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi Application Process 2025

Candidates must meet the prerequisites of the eligibility criteria. Those who wish to apply for admission to NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi can do so online. Candidates must pay an application fee in order to register for a course, according to information gathered from the internet. To finish the application procedure, candidates must fill out the form and upload the required documents in the correct dimensions.
Step 2: Selection Process

On the basis of merit, NIPS Hotel Management Ranchi shortlists applicants for the majority of the courses. For admission to courses like BHM, Certification, etc., the institute takes academic merit into account. The application form is screened as the first step in the selection process.
Step 3: Final Shortlist and Fee Payment

Those who make the final shortlist are required to use the aforementioned methods to pay the institute's specified course fee. Candidates who have paid the course fee are permitted to attend the institute's regular classes.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Konkan Krishi Vidyapeeth:

placements.overview: Founded in 1972, Konkan Krishi Vidyapeeth is a public university. It is located in Ratnagiri, Maharashtra. The institute is accredited with ICAR. Konkan Krishi Vidyapeeth provides UG, PG and Doctorate courses in Full Time mode. It provides 38 courses across specialisations such as Agriculture, Agriculture & Farm Engineering, Agriculture & Food Business, Biotechnology Engineering and Chemistry. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. Konkan Krishi Vidyapeeth fees is INR 48,000. The student intake for these courses is 145. Konkan Krishi Vidyapeeth offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Science. Konkan Krishi Vidyapeeth offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Fisheries Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Things you should know before taking admission in College of Fisheries, Ratnagiri.

review_content.Placements: The fisheries course is nice for those who own a pond or are planning to make a pond. Further, you can also work in the fisheries industry such as food processing or value addition industries. All jobs regarding the fisheries sector are available, and further, you can do Masters and Ph.D.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the boys' hostel is not good, but that of the girls' hostel is nice, and the fee is also less. The mess is present in both hostels, and the hostels are present near the college only. The library is present and provides students with all the required books and other books required for competitive exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the teachers and faculty members, as well as the infrastructure .

review_content.Placements: Students were placed based on their knowledge instead of percentage and the highest package was a 3.5 LPA from Sygenta with the job role of Sales Executive. Also for the internships, the company was Swal Corporation from Kopargaon and Sangamner, with a period of 3 months and a stipend of Rs 10k per month for marketing executives.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college includes Wi-Fi, a gym, high-tech labs, large classrooms, a library, a nursery, farms, poultry and a hostel. It is neat and clean, with moderate room sizes and beds, including food. There is also ground for Kabaddi, football, volleyball and kho-kho. The tournaments are held in college and all the fests are celebrated in college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. Hons. in Horticulture - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: All the facilities were given to the students.

review_content.Placements: 36 percent of students were placed in our course. 7 LPA was the highest, 2.3 LPA was the lowest, and 3 LPA was the average package offered in our course. The top recruiting companies for our course were Reliance, Remini, etc. 45% of students get internships through our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our institute was good. The institute was offering all the facilities to students, which were good, including Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, big classrooms, etc. The quality of the facilities in the hostel was good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen was good to eat.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.F.Sc. in Aquaculture - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college for doing a master's degree.

review_content.Placements: In our college, about 60% of students are placed. The salary package offered is 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Neospark. Godrej, Grauer & Weil, Cargill, etc., visit our campus. Every student must participate in an experiential learning program that includes internships with diverse feed companies and farms.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure. Labs are spacious. Classrooms are available. Wi-Fi is available. Digital classrooms are available. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. The quality of the food in the mess is good. A playground is available to play cricket, volleyball, and table tennis. Indoor games are available. A gym is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.F.Sc. in Fisheries Resources Management - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The best college to pursue a master's in aquatic environment and fisheries resource management.

review_content.Placements: Few placements are there in the mangrove foundation. Students in the ELPA program are hired directly by private companies. 60% of students got placed. The highest package is about INR 10 lacs per annum. Neospark, Growel, Cargil Pvt. Ltd., etc. are the top recruiting companies. Every student had an internship last year (in the 7th and 8th semesters).
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has separate classrooms and labs for various departments. There is an old boys hostel for PG and Ph.D. students and new boys hostel for UG Boys. Sagarkanya Girls Hostel for UG, PG, and Ph.D. girls. A well-maintained mess facility for both boys and girls are there.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.F.Sc. in Fish Processing Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for a master's degree in fish processing technology.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in the private sector. The remaining 20% of students got placed in the government sector. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Various fish processing companies, medicine, and equipment companies recruit students. All students got internships at Gadre Marine Pvt. Ltd.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college building is very good. Classrooms are spacious in every department. Laboratories are available. There is a well-equipped library. Internet facilities are available on our campus. Reading rooms are air-conditioned. Separate hostels are available for both boys and girls. Mess is also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by College of FisheriesReviewed on 10 Jun 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college provides separate hostels for boys and girls. They provide separate hostels for undergraduates, postgraduates, and Ph.D. students. The mess is combined for all boys and girls in their respective accommodations. They provide a separate department for each course. Classrooms are spacious. Labs are available for practical learning. The library is well-maintained. It has all the required books, refere...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by College of FisheriesReviewed on 14 May 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Fisheries.
reviews.review_text: Each department has separate classrooms and labs. We have good and spacious hostel rooms. Around 2 students can share each room. The hostel provides all amenities. The library provides both online and offline resources. A gym facility is available in the hostel. We can play table tennis and carrom in the hostel. Wi-Fi is available in our college. A doctor is available near the hostel. Our college has a good library and labs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by College of FisheriesReviewed on 5 May 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Aquatic Environment Management is one of the best departments to pursue a Master's or Ph.D.
reviews.review_text:
Well-constructed infrastructure is there. Good facility for libraries and practical resources. Wi-Fi is available.
Smart classrooms with digital resources are there.
Hostel with each room sharing two beds and a mess facility within the campus. As it's a coastal region, we get fish for two days meals.
All university games, youth events, etc. are conducted.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by College of FisheriesReviewed on 23 Feb 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placement in 2022.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available all over the campus, only available in library for study purpose. There are so many laboratories in the college. Such as wet lab, microbiology lab, biochemistry lab, aquaculture lab, processing hall, IT lab, fishing gear lab, marine Biology lab, modular kitchen, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by College of FisheriesReviewed on 13 Nov 2022)
reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with faculty members, but our college had good placements in 2015.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides various facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a live fish laboratory for aquaculture, and a projector in each classroom. All projectors are working well. Each department has a separate laboratory for various purposes like aquaculture, biochemistry, fisheries engineering, fisheries biology processing hall, and modular kitchen.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Shradchandrajee Pawar College of Food TechnologyReviewed on 6 Jul 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely disappointed because of the placements. Infrastructure is the best.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the best among all the colleges. Staff is also best and training and teaching provided here is good. Labs are clean regularly and they are well-equipped. No Wi-Fi is available in the campus. Classrooms are big and cleaned on time. Hostels are great. Sports teacher is good. Sports and games such as volleyball, cricket, kabbadi, khokho, badminton, chess, carrom, etc. are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by College of Agricultural, SaralgaonReviewed on 5 Feb 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of college infrastructure, faculty, placements, internships and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very small for 90 students, and it is not comfortable. There's no hostel facility for boys after 1st year, and the hostel present is very unhygienic. No Wi-Fi is provided either in college or hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is located in an excellent place.
reviews.review_text: The hostel here is very good with a library, but the Wi-Fi facility is not available. There are trees in the hostel, and we study under them. Classrooms are good with smart projectors as well as blackboards. The medical department is available in our college to meet any emergency of students.

reviews.review_heading: It has great opportunities to make our career in agriculture field.
reviews.review_text: Our university had good infrastructure. Labs had new machinery and implements. Classrooms and playground for sports and other activities were good enough. One should definitely visit our college. They will automatically know the campus placements and hostel facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Great faculty providing a good course.

review_content.Placements: The college management was offering a 100% placements guarantee, but the college did not stand on its words. The average percentage of placements for out seniors is 75% and when it comes to my batch, nearly 65% students got placements . The highest salary offered is as follows: For marketing students = 2.4 LPA For finance students = 2.2 LPA For HR, it is nearly 1.8 LPA. The lowest salary offered is as follows, For marketing, it is 1.2 LPA. For Finance, it is 1.2 LPA. For HR, it is 1 LPA. Mostly startups and 2-years old companies visited the campus, and the most of them offered for marketing. Out of all students, 50% got placements into marketing, 25% in HR and 25% in finance. Coming to interns, the management will definitely provide the students with internships. Almost every student in our batch got the internship while some did interns with two companies as well. Finally the report about our college, the big plus to the college is faculty. Though they offer you an average rate of placements, you can go with this college, if you have zeal to learn and have good communication skills, so that you can survive anyone.

placements.overview:
Rayat Bahra Group of Institutes, Ropar Campus is a private institute, established in 2001 in Ropar, Punjab. Rayat Bahra Group of Institutes, Ropar Campus is approved by AICTE, NCTE and PCI and offers a total of 60 courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in 13 specialisations such as Agriculture, Automobile Engineering, Chemistry, Civil Engineering and Computer Science. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. in both Full Time and Part Time modes. Rayat Bahra Group of Institutes, Ropar Campus fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 46,000 to 3,23,400. Rayat Bahra Group of Institutes, Ropar Campus has an annual seat intake of 2569 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Law. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty is good, infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: There are 60 students in my course, but the college has 120 students overall, so there are two sections of 60 each. The placements were also good, with an average package of 5 lakh per annum. Companies that came for placements include Sun Pharma, Centrient Pharmaceuticals, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent in this college. Wi-Fi is available both in the college and in the hostel, with high-speed internet. Classrooms and labs are equipped with advanced technology. The hostel mess provides good food, and there are three canteens on campus: one CCD, one juice corner, and one tuck shop.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.Hons.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the Bachelor's degree, but I don't recommend it for master's degree.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students got placed in our course of batch 2021. 3 LPA is the highest package offered. The lowest package is about 2 LPA, and the average package is 2.5 LPA. Wipro, Trident, TCS, Asian Paints, BYJU's, etc., came here. 75% of students got internships in Wipro, BYJU's etc. The others got in small or local companies. Manager and assistant manager roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in our college with a good speed. Big machines are available in labs for pharmacy students. Separate libraries are available for different departments. The quality of food is the best in the hostel. Games and sports facilities are not available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The 2014 batch of ECE branch was awesome.

review_content.Placements: During our placements, many famous companies visited our college for the placements. Those companies were Flipkart, Tech Mahindra, Google, Helli Labs, and others. About 30% of students were placed from our electronics and communication batch because half of the students did not take place in the placement drives. The highest salary package provided by the companies was 18 LPA. Almost all students of our batch got internships during the six months of their industrial training. Some students even got paid internships. The college provided the best course for networking, marketing, data science, and data analysis.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Almost 85% of the students scored good marks. If your any elder brother or sister is also studying in this college, then they give you extra marks. The role offered is pharmacist accountant.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is average. The food of the mess is of very poor quality, and there is less cleaning in the hostel. There are no lights on the road, which causes a problem in the night to walk. Medical facilities are average, but there are many canteens on the campus.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, but they judge students by their money but not by their knowledge. Teaching quality is very low. The director of our college does not want to talk with students and does not listen to students' problems.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is a good campus for studies.

review_content.Placements: Due to the COVID-19 pandemic situation, not many companies gave placement opportunities to students. So, only a few students got placed. As per I know, the highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.2 LPA. Only 5% to 10% of the students got internships from here. Main roles offered by this course are programmer and coding expert for website designing.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are great for every department. All the classrooms, libraries and labs are in good condition. The entire campus is hygienic and clean. The hostel also provides good facilities, and the food served is also good. There is a variety of food items on a weekly basis. Sports are also good as there are teams for many games like cricket, badminton and football.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: The college provides good knowledge, and it is value for money paid.

review_summary.college_name: Rayat Bahra Group of Institutes, Ropar Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty is good, infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: There are 60 students in my course, but the college has 120 students overall, so there are two sections of 60 each. The placements were also good, with an average package of 5 lakh per annum. Companies that came for placements include Sun Pharma, Centrient Pharmaceuticals, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent in this college. Wi-Fi is available both in the college and in the hostel, with high-speed internet. Classrooms and labs are equipped with advanced technology. The hostel mess provides good food, and there are three canteens on campus: one CCD, one juice corner, and one tuck shop.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.Hons.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the Bachelor's degree, but I don't recommend it for master's degree.

content.Placements: 60% of students got placed in our course of batch 2021. 3 LPA is the highest package offered. The lowest package is about 2 LPA, and the average package is 2.5 LPA. Wipro, Trident, TCS, Asian Paints, BYJU's, etc., came here. 75% of students got internships in Wipro, BYJU's etc. The others got in small or local companies. Manager and assistant manager roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in our college with a good speed. Big machines are available in labs for pharmacy students. Separate libraries are available for different departments. The quality of food is the best in the hostel. Games and sports facilities are not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The 2014 batch of ECE branch was awesome.

content.Placements: During our placements, many famous companies visited our college for the placements. Those companies were Flipkart, Tech Mahindra, Google, Helli Labs, and others. About 30% of students were placed from our electronics and communication batch because half of the students did not take place in the placement drives. The highest salary package provided by the companies was 18 LPA. Almost all students of our batch got internships during the six months of their industrial training. Some students even got paid internships. The college provided the best course for networking, marketing, data science, and data analysis.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of faculty members.

content.Placements: Almost 85% of the students scored good marks. If your any elder brother or sister is also studying in this college, then they give you extra marks. The role offered is pharmacist accountant.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is average. The food of the mess is of very poor quality, and there is less cleaning in the hostel. There are no lights on the road, which causes a problem in the night to walk. Medical facilities are average, but there are many canteens on the campus.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, but they judge students by their money but not by their knowledge. Teaching quality is very low. The director of our college does not want to talk with students and does not listen to students' problems.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is a good campus for studies.

content.Placements: Due to the COVID-19 pandemic situation, not many companies gave placement opportunities to students. So, only a few students got placed. As per I know, the highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.2 LPA. Only 5% to 10% of the students got internships from here. Main roles offered by this course are programmer and coding expert for website designing.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are great for every department. All the classrooms, libraries and labs are in good condition. The entire campus is hygienic and clean. The hostel also provides good facilities, and the food served is also good. There is a variety of food items on a weekly basis. Sports are also good as there are teams for many games like cricket, badminton and football.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good, infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent in this college. Wi-Fi is available both in the college and in the hostel, with high-speed internet. Classrooms and labs are equipped with advanced technology. The hostel mess provides good food, and there are three canteens on campus: one CCD, one juice corner, and one tuck shop.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the Bachelor's degree, but I don't recommend it for master's degree.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college with a good speed. Big machines are available in labs for pharmacy students. Separate libraries are available for different departments. The quality of food is the best in the hostel. Games and sports facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: The 2014 batch of ECE branch was awesome.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Ropar campus was very calm and peaceful. All departments were well-constructed with a separate lawn where the students can study, play and enjoy their free time. All classrooms are neat and clean. The library of Rayat Bahra Ropar Campus is very well-organised, where you can receive  4 books at a time. There is also an e-library, where students can prepare for their placements. All computers, electronics and mechanical labs are good. Faculty do all type of practicals rel...

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Everything is average. The food of the mess is of very poor quality, and there is less cleaning in the hostel. There are no lights on the road, which causes a problem in the night to walk. Medical facilities are average, but there are many canteens on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good campus for studies.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are great for every department. All the classrooms, libraries and labs are in good condition. The entire campus is hygienic and clean. The hostel also provides good facilities, and the food served is also good. There is a variety of food items on a weekly basis. Sports are also good as there are teams for many games like cricket, badminton and football.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good knowledge, and it is value for money paid.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms facilities were pretty good. The college does not provide any medical and canteen facilities. We can only buy tea on campus at that time. The college provided football and kabbadi games for students. Faculty available for sports were also very good and experienced.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college was good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was aesthetic. The food quality in the mess was also good. There was a gym, indoor game room. Laboratories were maintained and cleaned. Wi-Fi and electricity facility (24*7) was provided. Library was always open for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Great ! Great and Great ! Go for Rayat !
reviews.review_text: College Infrastructure was Good. Faculty and staff was good. College Mess was also too clean. Quality of food was also very good and at very reasonable price. College management always motivates students for sports and extra activities in college and out of college too.

reviews.review_heading: The college experience was too good, and placement is your task.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. Rayat always maintains its decorum. The availability of labs was less at that time, but now it is all set with all needed instruments which helps the students to prepare practically as well. College also provides the facility of the hostel, which was also a part of great college life within the college. Moreover, it offers different types of playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: Extraordinary teaching skills.
reviews.review_text: The college also provides high-speed Wi-Fi with modern laptops and the level of labs is very high and high tech Wi-Fi is used for doing projects works very fastly due to high-speed acceleration and the computer room is enabled with apple laptops and accessories. Whereas hostel of the college is highly maintained food gives home like feelings.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life is pretty good. There is an open campus and you can sit in groups.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very well maintained. Our college organizes a lot of seminars which gives practical knowledge to all of the students. Due to these seminars students get the information about the things which industries expect from us as a fresher. Our college organizes fest and fresher's party every year which gives opportunities to the students with different interests and talent. Teachers of our college are very supporting and always encourages the students to do their best and t...

reviews.review_heading: Placements in the college and the college environment were good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. The campus was lush- green and spread over a large area with direct connectivity to the highway, which makes it easier for students to reach on time. Labs and other classroom infrastructure were also good with all the facilities except elevators.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, and it provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities. The college has provided Jio Wi-Fi in every room, and CCTV cameras and a big library are also available.  The college has 2 grounds for playing. Quality of labs is not that good. In every lab, there are at least 1 or 2 machines which are not working. Quality of classrooms is good with proper lighting and fans. There is a canteen available in college and the quality of food served is good enough. Hostel rooms are clean and very fresh. They also provide study ...

reviews.review_heading: Best college in whole Punjab.
reviews.review_text: College is really beautiful from and also from inside as well. Awesome gardens and really big football which also used for cricket tournaments, sports event and for some college events too. And. Auditorium not really big but its is big enough for B.Tech students to sit and also have air conditioning all in all it is good enough. Hostel I tell guys you gona love the best thing in the whole college or will sy best in Punjab it located little far from study area in the college so 10 min walk daily ...

reviews.review_heading: Loved to be a part of RIEIT, Ropar Campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good, the was like on the backside you see Mountains and on the Front side there is a River due to which the weather used to cool at all times. There was separate blocks/buildings for different streams of Engineering, also there was a separate building for Law college and Polytechnic college. Also a large Playground + Canteens.
